  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AttributeUpdateAdapter
    Updates the Rodin element attributes when a SET operation occurred on a LightElement attribute.
    AttributeUpdateAdapterFactory
     
    DeltaProcessor
    Processes deltas from the database in order to update the EMF light core model associated to the light root element.
    DeltaRootAdapter
    This is the adapter for light root elements which have to listen for Rodin Database modifications, thus updating their light model accordingly.
    DeltaRootAdapterFactory
    The factory to get synchronisation with the Rodin Database from the listening of deltas (i.e.
    DeltaRootAdapterFactory.NullDeltaRootAdapter
     
    ImplicitDeltaProcessor
    Processes Rodin Database deltas in order to refresh the implicit children for the given root.
    ImplicitDeltaRootAdapter
    Processes the delta, relatively to the given root which is interested to update its implicit children.
    ImplicitDeltaRootAdapterFactory
    Factory for ImplicitDeltaRootAdapter
    ImplicitDeltaRootAdapterFactory.NullImplicitDeltaRootAdapter
